authority: Autonomous — Tim sleeping, full authority granted

deliverables.title: Promises page name leak fix
deliverables.description: Fixed 'Nana the Pro...' test account name leaking on Promises page for unauthenticated users. Added conditional: only show user name when authenticated user is viewing their own promises.

deliverables.title: Dignity Score ring cutoff fix
deliverables.description: Fixed Dignity Score ring being cut off on right edge of mobile screens (390px). Reduced bar height to 32px, text to 10px, added shrink-0 to both indicators, tightened gap spacing.

deliverables.title: Hero text overflow fix
deliverables.description: Fixed landing page body text overflowing right edge on mobile. Added text-sm breakpoint, break-words, max-w-full, and overflow-hidden.

deliverables.title: Get My Free Box CTA
deliverables.description: Added prominent 'Get My Free Box' button on landing page below 'Meet Grace'. Links to /membership with Essentials Box request flow.

deliverables.title: Observer → Get Started Free rename
deliverables.description: Renamed 'Observer' free tier to 'Get Started Free' across all surfaces: Membership page, AdminDashboard, stripe.ts product definitions.

deliverables.title: Grace opening message rewrite
deliverables.description: Removed fake user message ('Hi! I heard Maven delivers toilet paper?'). Grace now opens the conversation herself with a SYSTEM instruction to introduce herself warmly with genuine curiosity. No barrier, no fake prompt.

deliverables.title: Vampire Slayer Grace feedback loop
deliverables.description: After adding first subscription, Grace-style toast shows monthly total. Subsequent adds show running total with annual projection. Creates feedback loop that keeps Ruby engaged.

deliverables.title: Big Mama explanation on Community Credits
deliverables.description: Added one-line warm explanation: 'Big Mama is the heart of our community. She keeps track of what you give and makes sure it comes back to you.'

deliverables.title: Privacy trust signal in footer
deliverables.description: Added 'We never sell your data. Ever.' in bold primary color to landing page footer, above the existing 'It's expensive to be poor' quote.

deliverables.title: Testimonial placeholder on landing page
deliverables.description: Added placeholder testimonial: 'I found $47 a month I didn't know I was spending. Grace found it in 10 minutes.' — A Maven member, Red Deer. Styled as a subtle card above the privacy statement.

learning_notes: Grace's opening message should never be a fake user message — it breaks the 'Grace speaks first' principle
Mobile layout at 390px needs explicit shrink-0 on flex items to prevent ring cutoff
Test account data leaking to unauthenticated views is a trust-breaking bug — always gate user-specific display
The 'Get My Free Box' CTA was the most impactful missing element on the landing page — core value prop was invisible
